value.found_quote: Anthropic's Claude models are available through Vertex AI. ... Claude is also available through Amazon Bedrock, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry.
value.rationale: The page explicitly confirms that Anthropic's Claude models are available on Google Cloud's Vertex AI (a third-party platform), and also mentions availability on Amazon Bedrock, Claude Platform on AWS, and Microsoft Foundry. This directly substantiates the claim that Anthropic offers Claude on third-party platforms. The offering is described as generally available (active), with detailed documentation on making requests, model availability, and feature support.
